SEARCH
Package taskmanager.api

Interface TaskService

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultTaskService
public interface TaskService
Service interface for managing tasks. This interface defines asynchronous (reactive) operations for creating, deleting, and retrieving tasks. All methods return reactive types (Mono or Flux), meaning results are produced asynchronously.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Void>
    addTask(Task task)
    Adds a new task.
    reactor.core.publisher.Flux<Task>
    findAllTasks()
    Retrieves all tasks as a stream.
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<List<Task>>
    findAllTasksAsList()
    Retrieves all tasks as a list.
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Task>
    findTaskById(String taskId)
    Finds a task by its ID.
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Void>
    removeTask(String taskId)
    Removes a task by its ID.

  • Method Details

    • addTask

      reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Void> addTask(Task task)
      Adds a new task.
      Parameters:
      task - the task to add
      Returns:
      a Mono that completes when the task is added

    • removeTask

      reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Void> removeTask(String taskId)
      Removes a task by its ID.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the ID of the task to remove
      Returns:
      a Mono that completes when the task is removed

    • findTaskById

      reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Task> findTaskById(String taskId)
      Finds a task by its ID.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the ID of the task
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the found task

    • findAllTasks

      reactor.core.publisher.Flux<Task> findAllTasks()
      Retrieves all tasks as a stream.
      Returns:
      a Flux emitting all tasks

    • findAllTasksAsList

      reactor.core.publisher.Mono<List<Task>> findAllTasksAsList()
      Retrieves all tasks as a list.
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting a list of all tasks
